description: An annual publication about fencing and dueling.  There are many good illustrations which describe proper technique and form.
A hefty military field manual about bayonet usage and combat theory.

name.str: TC 7-21.3 (CUI) Special Forces Piercing Weapon Techniques

description: A large military manual describing advanced techniques and practices for all manner of piercing weapons, from knives and bayonets to shivs and long pointy sticks. Requires some experience to understand.
